case_title: ROBERT LEW LEE VS. LEGACY J CORPORATION, A DELAWARE CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEE, ROBERT LEW AS TO DEFENDANT LEGACY J CORPORATION, A DELAWARE CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
